technical_constraints: ZERO modifications to existing pages/components, except HomeController.Index()
All text default in English (using Loc.T() keys)
Must include data-testid on interactive elements
design_constraints: Re-use _DoctorMascot.cshtml in hero or onboarding section
Warm/organic accents combined with brand blue

primary.classes: btn btn-primary btn-lg rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold
primary.css_overrides: background-color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); color: white; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;

secondary.classes: btn btn-outline-primary btn-lg rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold

cards.css_overrides: background: var(--surface-white); border-radius: var(--radius-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-subtle); transition: transform 0.3s ease;

navbar.behavior: Sticky-top, starts transparent, becomes solid white with subtle shadow on scroll (implement via simple JS or CSS sticky).
navbar.elements: Logo left, Links center, Language selector + Sign In + CTA right.

blurred_preview.blur_overlay: position-absolute top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center
blurred_preview.css_blur: backdrop-filter: blur(8px); background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), rgba(255,255,255,0.9) 60%);

sections.name: Header / Navbar
content: Logo
Links: How it works, For Clinics, Pricing
Right: Language Selector (Loc.T dropdown), Sign In (data-testid='nav-login-btn'), Try Free CTA (data-testid='nav-cta-btn')

sections.name: Hero Section
sections.layout: Row with 2 columns (col-lg-7 text, col-lg-5 visual).
content: Overline: 'Medical-grade AI in your pocket' (Loc.T)
H1: 'Understand your lab results in 30 seconds' (Loc.T)
Subtitle: 'Upload your PDF and get a clear, personalized explanation of your biomarkers.' (Loc.T)
CTA Primary: 'Try free now' -> Redirects to upload/register (data-testid='hero-cta-btn')
Trust text: '1 free credit on registration • No credit card required'
Visual: EITHER an abstract medical dashboard mockup OR an image of the existing Mascot (_DoctorMascot.cshtml) greeting the user beside a clean UI card.
sections.styling: Background: var(--background_base). Huge padding. No gradients.

sections.name: Audience Pillars
content: H2 (Center): 'Built for everyone in healthcare'
Card 1: For Individuals (Patient Icon, 'Understand your health trends...', CTA: 'Get my report')
Card 2: For Labs (Microscope Icon, 'Automate interpretations...', CTA: 'Partner with us')
Card 3: For Clinics (Stethoscope Icon, 'Process 100s of reports/day...', CTA: 'See CAM module')

sections.name: Why Interpret Your Results
content: Image: 'modern medical clinic' or 'doctor patient consultation' (from media_urls)
H2: 'Why interpretation matters'
List items: Catch issues early, communicate better with doctors, monitor chronic conditions, track family health.
sections.styling: Generous spacing. Image max-height 80vh with soft rounded corners.

sections.name: How It Works
sections.layout: Row with 3 staggered columns or step cards.
content: Step 1: Upload PDF (Secure & encrypted)
Step 2: AI Interprets (30s processing, 15,000+ biomarkers)
Step 3: Get Full Report (Clear language, actionable insights)

sections.name: Blurred Preview / Teaser
content: Top half of card: Shows fake patient data, 'Cholesterol: 218 mg/dL (High)' with clear UI.
Bottom half: Blurred heavily using backdrop-filter.
Overlay CTA on blurred section: 'Sign up to unlock the full medical report & recommendations' (data-testid='preview-unlock-btn').

sections.name: Feature Grid & Pricing Teaser
content: Features: 30 Languages, Family Profiles, Compare Reports, LOINC Standardization, Risk Factors.
Pricing block: 'Free first interpretation. Then simple pay-as-you-go credit packages.'
sections.styling: Card backgrounds soft secondary (Sage) or primary_light for visual break.

sections.name: Trust & Credibility Row
content: Stats: 30+ Languages, GDPR Compliant, HIPAA-style security, X+ Interpretations.
Muted logos or trust badges.

sections.name: Testimonials
content: Cards with 5 stars, generic medical/patient feedback (lorem or Loc.T placeholders).

sections.name: B2B Clinic CTA
content: H2: 'Process 100s of reports a day?'
Subtitle: 'Discover our CAM module for clinics.'
CTA Secondary (White/Outline): 'Request Demo' (data-testid='b2b-demo-btn')

sections.name: Footer
content: Brand Logo
Language Selector
Links: Terms, Privacy, GDPR, Contact
Social Icons

media_urls.description: Female doctor consulting a patient in a modern medical office. Use for 'Why Interpret' section.
Clean, sterile modern medical facility. Use for B2B/Clinic background or Hero visual alternative.

implementation_notes_for_agent: CREATE a new CSS file at ~/css/landing.css. DO NOT edit site.css.
Map colors to CSS variables in landing.css root: --primary, --accent, etc.
Use Bootstrap utility classes (d-flex, align-items-center, py-5, gap-4) extensively.
DO NOT use React or JS frameworks. Build views in pure HTML/Razor inside Views/Home/Landing.cshtml (or equivalent).
In HomeController.cs, modify Index() to check if User.Identity.IsAuthenticated. If false, return View("Landing"); else return RedirectToAction("Dashboard");
Always use Loc.T('...') for text. Example: @Loc.T("Try free now")
Include the _DoctorMascot.cshtml partial in the Hero section.
Implement the blurred preview card using raw HTML + CSS backdrop-filter, demonstrating exactly the 60% blur requirement.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons and forms as specified.
